message:
fix(palette): correct viewport scrolling — reset position, exact line calc, bypass clamping

- Reset viewport to top after async recents load completes
- Replace heuristic category line estimation with exact iteration
- Assign YOffset directly to bypass broken SetYOffset clamping
  (SetContent only runs in View() value receiver, so lines is nil
  during Update(), making maxYOffset() always 0)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
